'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/feedmix?__cf_chl_rt_tk=k4aTWWGpLEq6Y4Zs60.gPFZK5pq4rXpyNZ6.CwBPP8c-1776727966-1.0.1.1-qjoGbjQtUcafx3FhlZDbpBquA5grdQqLCRP2G5Il9sM"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
